name: chr20_20q11_21_pseudocentromeric_SD
description: 20q11.1-q11.21 proximal pericentric duplicon belt — the centromere-proximal partner of the inv(20)(p12q11) inversion. Contains alpha-satellite remnants, the BANF1 region and SDs shared with 20p11. One of the densest pericentric SD belts in the genome and a key source of mosaic GRCh38 misassembly.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentric SDs of 100-500 kb at >99% identity flanking the chr20 centromere; alpha-satellite-flanking transition zone; intra-chr20 duplicon network linking 20p11 and 20q11; resolved only in T2T-CHM13.
